during the cold war the united states was led by several presidents including truman kennedy nixon and reagan while the soviet union was governed by leaders such as stalin khrushchev brezhnev and andropov the cold war was a period of intense rivalry between these two superpowers with neither side engaging in direct military conflict but instead competing through political economic and ideological means the leadership of each country played a crucial role in shaping the course of events during this time
